name: api_flux2_pro_1img
description: Flux.2 [pro] API — single-reference composition. Routes one LoadImage through a single-slot BatchImagesNode before feeding it, along with a text prompt, to Flux2ProImageNode. Best for single-subject portrait edits and reference-driven scene generation from one image. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured API key).

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the scene to generate from the reference image.
